docs.description: Use for architecture, roadmap, and design decisions

xcode-scheme.description: Xcode test scheme configuration with -parallel-testing-enabled NO

test:macOS.description: Run the full macOS XCTest suite (36 tests)
test:macOS.template:
Run the macOS Xcode test suite:

```bash
mise run test:macOS
```

test:ai-server.description: Run the Python AI server unit tests (117 tests, 100% coverage)
test:ai-server.template:
Run the AI server pytest suite:

```bash
mise run test:ai-server
```

build:macOS.template:
Build the macOS app:

```bash
mise run build:macOS
```

compose-up.description: Start local observability stack (OTel + Grafana + Prometheus + Jaeger + Loki)
compose-up.template:
Start the full observability stack:

```bash
mise run compose-up
# Grafana: http://localhost:3000 (admin/admin)
# Jaeger UI: http://localhost:16686
# Prometheus UI: http://localhost:9090
```

format:macOS.template:
Format Swift code:

```bash
mise run format:macOS
```
